---
title: "Problem Sets"
subtitle: "Problems sets are your opportunity to work on the skills discussed in class."
---


 - **Problem Set Due Dates**
       -   **Problem Set #1:** July 8th
        -   **Problem Set #2:** July 10th
       -   **Problem Set #3:** July 15th
        -   **Problem Set #4:** July 17th
       -   **Problem Set #5:** Nov. 22nd
       
<!--

Problem sets are completed individually. Each includes a data file and a starter R script. Download both, complete your work in RStudio, and submit your rendered `.html` Quarto file on Canvas by **11:59pm** on the due date.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Problem Set 1

**Due: Tuesday, July 8**

Topics: Data types, variable classification, importing data into R, exploratory summaries.

| Resource | Link |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| Instructions (PDF) | [ps1_instructions.pdf](problemsets/ps1_instructions.pdf) |
| Starter R script | [ps1_starter.R](problemsets/ps1_starter.R) |
| Data | [ps1_data.csv](problemsets/ps1_data.csv) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Problem Set 2

**Due: Thursday, July 10**

Topics: Descriptive statistics, histograms, boxplots, and bar charts with `ggplot2`.

| Resource | Link |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| Instructions (PDF) | [ps2_instructions.pdf](problemsets/ps2_instructions.pdf) |
| Starter R script | [ps2_starter.R](problemsets/ps2_starter.R) |
| Data | [ps2_data.csv](problemsets/ps2_data.csv) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Problem Set 3

**Due: Tuesday, July 15**

Topics: Probability rules, normal distribution, z-scores, and binomial probabilities.

| Resource | Link |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| Instructions (PDF) | [ps3_instructions.pdf](problemsets/ps3_instructions.pdf) |
| Starter R script | [ps3_starter.R](problemsets/ps3_starter.R) |
| Data | [ps3_data.csv](problemsets/ps3_data.csv) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Problem Set 4

**Due: Thursday, July 17**

Topics: Sampling distributions, Central Limit Theorem, and confidence intervals.

| Resource | Link |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| Instructions (PDF) | [ps4_instructions.pdf](problemsets/ps4_instructions.pdf) |
| Starter R script | [ps4_starter.R](problemsets/ps4_starter.R) |
| Data | [ps4_data.csv](problemsets/ps4_data.csv) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Problem Set 5

**Due: Saturday, November 22**

Topics: Hypothesis testing, linear regression, and interpretation of model output.

| Resource | Link |
|------------------------------------|------------------------------------|
| Instructions (PDF) | [ps5_instructions.pdf](problemsets/ps5_instructions.pdf) |
| Starter R script | [ps5_starter.R](problemsets/ps5_starter.R) |
| Data | [ps5_data.csv](problemsets/ps5_data.csv) |

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Submission Guidelines

-   Render your completed `.qmd` file to HTML and submit the `.html` output on Canvas.
-   Include your **name and problem set number** in the YAML header of your document.
-   Show all code (`echo: true`). Answers without supporting code will not receive credit.
-   Late submissions are accepted up to 48 hours after the deadline with a **20% deduction**. Work submitted after 48 hours will not be graded.

::: callout-tip
## Starter File YAML Header

Add this to the top of your `.qmd` file before submitting:

``` yaml
---
title: "Problem Set 1"
author: "Your Name"
date: today
format:
  html:
    echo: true
    toc: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---
```
:::

-->
